title: Flaky Test Remediation: test_main_loop_clean_shutdown
summary: Root cause analysis and remediation options for a flaky subprocess shutdown test.
notes: Root cause analysis with multiple candidate fixes and a recommendation. Has ADR-like qualities (options, pros/cons, risk assessment) but lacks formal decision status, Context/Decision/Consequences sections, and is filed under docs/archive/refactor/. Classified as DOC as it provides supporting context rather than a locked architectural decision.
